steps.title: Identify what the blank must mean
steps.content: The passage says literature became a medium through which the new nation ______ its autonomous identity, with authors helping to shape a distinctly Mexican literary tradition. The blank describes what the nation did with its identity through literature — a formative, creative process of bringing something into existence.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• "overcame": means defeated or conquered. “The nation overcame its autonomous identity” treats identity as an obstacle to defeat — contradicts the passage’s positive, formative framing. ✗
  • "realized": means made real or brought into concrete existence. “The nation realized its autonomous identity” through literature matches the passage perfectly. ✓
  • "decried": means publicly condemned. “The nation decried its autonomous identity” means it criticized its own identity — the opposite of what the passage describes. ✗
  • "evaded": means escaped or avoided. “The nation evaded its autonomous identity” means it shunned its own identity — contradicts the passage’s celebratory tone. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
